---
title: "SCIM 2.0 Group Resource (RFC 7643 §4.2)"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · group.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-068](../../adr/adr-068-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/scim/group.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/scim/group.schema.json)
- **Dialect:** `https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema`
- **`$id`:** `https://uiao.io/schemas/scim/group.schema.json`
:::

## Description

Validates a SCIM 2.0 'Group' resource as defined in RFC 7643 §4.2. Schema URN: urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:Group. Pinned to UIAO_143. Intentionally permissive (additionalProperties left open) per the SCIM extensibility model in RFC 7643 §3.3.

## Top-Level Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `schemas` | `$ref: common.schema.json#/$defs/schemasArray` | ✓ |  |
| `id` | `$ref: common.schema.json#/$defs/scimId` |  |  |
| `externalId` | `$ref: common.schema.json#/$defs/externalId` |  |  |
| `meta` | `$ref: common.schema.json#/$defs/meta` |  |  |
| `displayName` | string | ✓ | RFC 7643 §4.2. Human-readable name for the Group. REQUIRED. |
| `members` | array&lt;object&gt; |  | RFC 7643 §4.2. List of members. Sub-attributes are immutable: 'value' is the SCIM resource id, '$ref' is the resource URI. May reference Users or nested Groups. |

## Full Schema

```{.json filename="group.schema.json"}
{
  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
  "$id": "https://uiao.io/schemas/scim/group.schema.json",
  "title": "SCIM 2.0 Group Resource (RFC 7643 \u00a74.2)",
  "description": "Validates a SCIM 2.0 'Group' resource as defined in RFC 7643 \u00a74.2. Schema URN: urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:Group. Pinned to UIAO_143. Intentionally permissive (additionalProperties left open) per the SCIM extensibility model in RFC 7643 \u00a73.3.",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "schemas",
    "displayName"
  ],
  "properties": {
    "schemas": {
      "$ref": "common.schema.json#/$defs/schemasArray"
    },
    "id": {
      "$ref": "common.schema.json#/$defs/scimId"
    },
    "externalId": {
      "$ref": "common.schema.json#/$defs/externalId"
    },
    "meta": {
      "$ref": "common.schema.json#/$defs/meta"
    },
    "displayName": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1,
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a74.2. Human-readable name for the Group. REQUIRED."
    },
    "members": {
      "type": "array",
      "description": "RFC 7643 \u00a74.2. List of members. Sub-attributes are immutable: 'value' is the SCIM resource id, '$ref' is the resource URI. May reference Users or nested Groups.",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": {
          "value": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1,
            "description": "The 'id' attribute of the referenced SCIM resource."
          },
          "$ref": {
            "type": "string",
            "format": "uri",
            "description": "URI of the referenced SCIM resource (User or Group)."
          },
          "type": {
            "type": "string",
            "description": "Member type (e.g. 'User', 'Group'); canonical types are not constrained by RFC 7643 \u00a74.2."
          },
          "display": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "additionalProperties": true
      }
    }
  },
  "additionalProperties": true
}
```
